name: Banana Fig Bran Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Toasted wheat germ or bran
3/4 cup Dried Mission Figs, quartered and stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a moderate temperature.
2. In a large bowl, combine all the dry ingredients: yeast, Better for Bread Oour, wheat flour, toasted wheat germ or bran, instant nonfat dry milk, gluten, and salt.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the ripe banana slices, dried Mission figs (quartered with stems removed), egg whites, canola or vegetable oil, malt extract (or honey), and vanilla.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Pour in the very warm water and stir until a dough forms.
6. Transfer the batter to a greased bread pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake in the preheated oven until the bread is cooked through and golden brown.
8. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
